this page, you'll able choose from different versions software program including: Cocos2D Cocos2D stable stable choices.
this post, I'll referring creation simple iPhone game using most recent Cocos2D 2.X.

Just case... sprite basically image that rotated, moved, animated, scaled
Prior proceeding ahead with addition sprite, gathering some good game art/graphics.
After having downloaded required resources, unzip file drag everything over Resources folder available within Xcode.
With images ready-for-use, figure where you'd placing player.

addition this, also (568, 320) option which would denote that game would screen.
With Cocos2D came concept 'scenes'.
Each scene within game effectively used incorporating levels, menus, credits variety other assets that collaboratively work backbone iPhone game.
Within each scene, choose include several Photoshop designs that have separate properties including animations, background color, shadow even menus.
